name: French Synthetic Population 2024
description: 100k synthetic households for France - exploratory use only. Generated deterministically with seed=42 for benchmarking and scale validation. Not for production decision support.
intended_use: Benchmarking, scale validation, and exploratory analysis. Not suitable for production decision support.
redistribution_notes: Redistribution permitted under AGPL-3.0-or-later. Users must retain exploratory trust status labeling.
quality_notes: Synthetic data with deterministic generation (seed=42). Income distribution: 15k-95k EUR with linear ramp. Age: uniform 20-80. Energy values correlated with income.
